description: Modify the 'IEA_RWT.wpa' project to use a 2-blade rotor design. Run a BEM simulation with a wind speed of 10 m/s, 0-degree pitch, and a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) sweep from 1 to 12. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/two_blade_analysis.wpa. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/blade_count_report.txt containing the maximum Power Coefficient (Cp) on the first line, the TSR at which it occurs on the second line, and the blade count (2) on the third line.
